message.entry: Cannot use component {0} because it depends on an unknown component {1}.
Unregistered component with identifier {0} and version {1}.
Cannot register component at {0} because file {1} is invalid.
handle to unregistered component {0} with identifier {1} and version {2}
Comparison between {0} and {1} is not supported.
Argument must be a string or a character vector.
The following folder(s) claimed by the component are on the MATLAB search path:\n\n{0}
The following folder(s) claimed by the component are already claimed by other component(s):\n\n{0}

The property 'CanUseSearchSpace' is unsupported in this beta release of MATLAB. Components with 'CanUseSearchSpace' set to false may not work as expected. We suggest setting the 'CanUseSearchSpace' property to true.
